caption: A man is captured from the chest up against a plain, light-colored wall. He is wearing a light blue button-down shirt with abstract blue shapes on the shoulders and chest, and he has a black gaming headset with a microphone positioned over his mouth. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in small white letters in the bottom left corner of each scene. The man is gesturing with both hands raised beside his head. In the initial stages, his palms are open and facing forward, and he looks straight ahead. As the sequence progresses, he tilts his head slightly upward and closes his eyes, while his right hand shifts from an open palm to a position where his fingers are slightly curled and his hand is tilted. His expression transitions from neutral to one of concentration or contemplation.
